items.text: When performing diagnostics, be sure to check the "Troubleshooting Procedure" and follow the troubleshooting procedure.
Be sure to use a fully charged 12V battery (12V or higher).
If the 12V battery is undercharged (less than 10V), the diagnostic function stops and the SRS warning light illuminates.
When checking the manufacturer name of the SRS unit, use HDS to check the ECU manufacturer displayed in the data list.

rows.text: Common conditions:. 12V battery voltage 10-16V Typical Methods:. 1. Turn ignition to ON mode and wait at least 6 seconds.
1 drive cycle SRS warning light: on

Ground fault in cord between SRS unit and driver's airbag inflator (RA1+, RA1- lines) or ground fault in cord between SRS unit and passenger airbag inflator (LA1+, LA1- lines) Driver airbag internal failure (driver airbag inflator) or passenger airbag internal failure (passenger airbag inflator) SRS unit internal circuit failure
Common conditions:. 12V battery voltage 10-16V Typical Methods:. 1. Turn ignition to ON mode and wait at least 6 seconds.
1 drive cycle SRS warning light: on
